question.text: Which type of exchange member can trade on their own account as well as on behalf of clients, and also clear and settle their own trades?

answer.text: Trading cum Clearing Member (TCM) / Self Clearing Member (SCM)

explanation.text: **The Logic:** TCM/SCM can trade (own + client) AND clear/settle their own trades. TMs can only trade but clearing is done through a clearing member. PCMs can only clear, not trade. **The Trap:** TMs need a separate clearing member. PCMs cannot trade. APs are not members. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII covers similar membership categories. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Most exchange members operate as TCMs — this provides end-to-end capability without relying on external clearing members.
